results.engine_gap: delayed end-step ZONE_CHANGE return + 'until your next turn' damage prevention to you + self-exile
results.notes: Three engine gaps; damage-prevention-to-player is the load-bearing piece.
Wired: target creature choice -> PT_MODIFICATION (+2/+2 EOT) + KEYWORD_GRANT(first strike, EOT) + UNTAP.

results.engine_gap: convoke (cost reduction by tapping creatures) + per-player creature-type-share sacrifice cascade
results.notes: Convoke is engine gap; the per-player chain of choose-and-sacrifice is also nontrivial.

results.engine_gap: counter all opponent spells AND abilities + create token per countered
results.notes: Mass-counter requires walking the entire stack (and the abilities side); 'create token per spell countered' counts spells countered this resolution.

results.engine_gap: becomes-copy mass effect (each nonland permanent you control becomes a copy of target non-Aura permanent)
results.notes: Becomes-copy mass effect is engine gap.
Wired: opens 2-target choice over all creatures; handler validates two distinct controllers and emits ZONE_CHANGE bounces. No legal target pair => fizzles silently.

results.engine_gap: owner of target spell-or-creature puts it on top or bottom of library (player choice)
results.notes: Same family as Sudden Setback: spell-from-stack-to-library + permanent-to-library with owner's choice.

results.engine_gap: convoke + 'second from the top' library placement
results.notes: Convoke is engine gap. Position-2 library insertion is also not in engine API.

results.engine_gap: 'unless you discard a creature card' branch is approximated by always opening a discard-2 prompt over the full hand
results.notes: Wired: emits DRAW(3) + opens a discard-2 PendingChoice on caster's hand. The conditional waiver is best-effort.

results.engine_gap: convoke cost is engine gap (ignored at resolution)
results.notes: Wired: target choice (1 or 2 nonland permanents) -> ZONE_CHANGE bounce. If caster controls a Merfolk, emits one 1/1 W/U Merfolk token per permanent returned.
Wired: target creature choice -> COUNTER_ADDED('-1/-1', amount=4).

results.engine_gap: convoke + choose creature type + return ALL creatures of that type from grave to battlefield
results.notes: Multi-card mass return + chosen-type tracking is engine gap.
Wired: emits COUNTER_ADDED('-1/-1', 2) for every creature on the battlefield.
'If it isn't your main phase' check requires phase awareness during resolution; blight is doable but combined would mislead with main-phase resolution.

results.engine_gap: 'loses all creature types' clause is engine gap
results.notes: Wired: target creature -> PT_MODIFICATION(+3/-3, EOT). Type-erasure clause is best-effort dropped.

Wired modal (1 or both): mode 0 opens an exile-2-from-hand target prompt on the targeted opponent; mode 1 opens a target-creature choice and emits COUNTER_REMOVED for each counter type the chosen creature has.

results.engine_gap: delayed death trigger ('when that creature dies this turn, create a 2/2 B/G Elf token')
results.notes: Pump + lifelink keyword grant alone misses the load-bearing token; engine doesn't support 'until end of turn' delayed death-triggers cleanly.
'Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards' is the impulse-cast permission gap.

results.engine_gap: X damage + delayed-on-death exile-N-from-library + impulse-cast from those exiled cards
results.notes: Delayed exile-from-library on creature death is engine gap; cast-from-exile permission also.

results.engine_gap: X cost = blight-X + dual-target damage (each opponent + each creature they control)
results.notes: Variable X-cost via blight + multi-target damage cascade are engine gaps.
Wired: target your-creature -> PT_MODIFICATION(+2/+2, EOT) + KEYWORD_GRANT(hexproof, EOT).

results.engine_gap: behold (additional cost) + variable X library search + conditional 'put onto battlefield instead'
results.notes: Behold is engine gap; conditional ETB for searched card requires search-result mutation.

results.engine_gap: mill 4 + 'choose any of those 4 to return to your hand' (player choice over a transient set)
results.notes: Mill+choose-from-transient-pool requires a fresh choice type or stash mechanism; engine doesn't expose this yet.

results.engine_gap: X = power-difference of two chosen creatures + multi-target draw + multi-target pump
results.notes: Variable X based on chosen targets' power difference + parallel pump on both targets is engine gap.

results.engine_gap: exile-until-MV>=5 + cast-from-exile-without-paying-mana for the rest of the turn
results.notes: Conditional exile-loop and cast-from-exile permission are engine gaps.
